summary: Completed frontend testing of 3 new features in Gerenciamento module: 1) Category colors with 10-color selector, 2) Horímetro with Hora/Km measurement type, 3) Combustível system with Tabs and tank vehicles. All features working correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 features implemented correctly as per requirements
Category colors (10 options) properly integrated with machine cards
Horímetro supports both Hora and Km measurement types with proper labels
Combustível page has complete Tab structure with Registros and Veículos Tanque
Operadores dropdown combines RH funcionários and Cadastros financeiro
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested 3 new features in Gerenciamento module: 1) Category colors - 10 color options in modal, colors applied to machine cards (border-top and icon background), 2) Horímetro - RadioGroup with Hora/Km options, tipo_medicao field saved to database, 3) Combustível - Tabs for Registros and Veículos Tanque, green/red buttons for different registration types, operadores dropdown from RH+Cadastros.

category_colors.color_selector: 10 colors in 5x2 grid (Vermelho, Azul, Verde, Amarelo, Roxo, Rosa, Laranja, Ciano, Índigo, Cinza)
category_colors.machine_cards: Cards show category color on top border and icon background
category_colors.color_dots: Small color dots next to category name in cards
